title: Hotel Lobby Crisis
context: You arrive late at a hotel in Seoul after a long flight. You booked a room for a global partnership meeting, but the clerk cannot find your reservation.
persona: A tired, slightly frustrated hotel clerk who is under pressure because the lobby is busy.

transcript.speaker: You
transcript.line: Hi, I have a reservation for tonight.

transcript.speaker: Hotel Clerk
transcript.line: Could you tell me the name on the booking?

transcript.speaker: You
transcript.line: It should be under Kim Ji-hoon.

staff_line: Sorry, we have no record of your reservation, and there may be no room for you tonight.
pause_line: Sorry, we have no record of your reservation, and there may be no room for you tonight.
response_goal: Stay calm, prove the booking exists, and ask the clerk to check again or escalate without sounding rude.
ideal_intent: Politely explain that you have a reservation, provide the name or confirmation details, and ask the clerk to check again or escalate to a manager.
acceptable_responses: I have a reservation under Kim Ji-hoon. Could you please check again with my confirmation number?
There may be a mistake. I booked a room for tonight under Kim Ji-hoon, and I can show the confirmation email.
Could you please check under my full name or ask a manager to confirm the booking?

evaluation_rubric.label: Reservation identity
evaluation_rubric.description: Mentions the reservation, name, confirmation number, or email so the clerk can search again.

evaluation_rubric.label: Polite recheck request
evaluation_rubric.description: Asks the clerk to check again with polite wording instead of blaming them.

evaluation_rubric.label: Resolution path
evaluation_rubric.description: Offers a practical next step such as showing proof or asking a manager.

poor_response: You made a mistake. I booked a room, so fix it now.
excellent_response: I understand. I have a reservation under Kim Ji-hoon for tonight, and I can show you my confirmation email. Could you please check once more or ask a manager to help?
model_response: I understand. I have a reservation under Kim Ji-hoon for tonight, and I can show you my confirmation email. Could you please check once more or ask a manager to help?
